description: Frontend development profile — Puppeteer, Figma, Storybook

puppeteer.description: Browser automation — screenshot components, verify layouts, run visual tests

figma.description: Read Figma designs — extract components, colors, typography, spacing tokens

storybook.description: Interact with Storybook — list components, read stories, trigger visual tests

filesystem.description: Read and write frontend source files

fetch.description: Fetch component library docs, CSS references, design system documentation
